<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
根据错误信息，问题主要有两类：

1. **`userEvent.click()` 没有 `await`** - 错误提示 "The call was not awaited. This method is asynchronous and must be awaited"
2. **第一个测试中使用了 `{ hidden: true }` 但元素不存在** - 因为使用了 lazy mount 默认行为

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- filePath: `/Users/elonehoo/Developer/destyler-dev/ui/packages/vue/src/components/combobox/test/combobox.test.ts`
- newString:

```
  it('should show options on click', async () => {
    render(Basic)

    await userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByRole('option', { name: 'React' })).toBeVisible())
  })

  it('should handle item selection', async () => {
    render(Basic)

    await userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByRole('option', { name: 'React' })).toBeVisible())

    await userEvent.click(page.getByRole('option', { name: 'React' }))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByRole('combobox')).toHaveValue('React'))
  })

  it('should call onValueChange when item is selected', async () => {
    const onValueChange = vi.fn()
    render(Basic, { props: { onValueChange } })

    await userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByRole('option', { name: 'React' })).toBeVisible())

    await userEvent.click(page.getByRole('option', { name: 'React' }))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(onValueChange).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1))
  })

  it('should open menu when onOpenChange is called', async () => {
    const onOpenChange = vi.fn()
    render(Basic, { props: { onOpenChange } })

    await userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(onOpenChange).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1))
  })

  it('should be read-only when readOnly is true', async () => {
    render(Basic, { props: { readOnly: true } })

    await userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByRole('option', { name: 'React' })).not.toBeInTheDocument())
  })

  it('should be able to lazy mount its items', async () => {
    render(Basic, { props: { lazyMount: true } })
    expect(page.getByTestId('positioner')).not.toBeInTheDocument()

    await userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByTestId('positioner')).toBeVisible())
  })

  it('should be able to lazy mount and unmount its items', async () => {
    render(Basic, { props: { lazyMount: true, unmountOnExit: true } })
    expect(page.getByTestId('positioner')).not.toBeInTheDocument()

    await userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByTestId('positioner')).toBeInTheDocument())

    await userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByTestId('positioner')).not.toBeInTheDocument())
  })
```

- oldString:

```
  it('should show options on click', async () => {
    render(Basic)

    expect(page.getByRole('option', { hidden: true, name: 'React' })).not.toBeVisible()

    userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByRole('option', { name: 'React' })).toBeVisible())
  })

  it('should handle item selection', async () => {
    render(Basic)

    userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByRole('option', { name: 'React' })).toBeVisible())

    userEvent.click(page.getByRole('option', { name: 'React' }))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByRole('combobox')).toHaveValue('React'))
  })

  it('should call onValueChange when item is selected', async () => {
    const onValueChange = vi.fn()
    render(Basic, { props: { onValueChange } })

    userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByRole('option', { name: 'React' })).toBeVisible())

    userEvent.click(page.getByRole('option', { name: 'React' }))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(onValueChange).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1))
  })

  it('should open menu when onOpenChange is called', async () => {
    const onOpenChange = vi.fn()
    render(Basic, { props: { onOpenChange } })

    userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(onOpenChange).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1))
  })

  it('should be read-only when readOnly is true', async () => {
    render(Basic, { props: { readOnly: true } })

    userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByText('React')).not.toBeVisible())
  })

  it('should be able to lazy mount its items', async () => {
    render(Basic, { props: { lazyMount: true } })
    expect(page.getByTestId('positioner')).not.toBeInTheDocument()

    userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByTestId('positioner')).toBeVisible())
  })

  it('should be able to lazy mount and unmount its items', async () => {
    render(Basic, { props: { lazyMount: true, unmountOnExit: true } })
    expect(page.getByTestId('positioner')).not.toBeInTheDocument()

    userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    expect(await page.getByText('positioner')).toBeInTheDocument()

    userEvent.click(page.getByText('Open'))
    await vi.waitFor(() => expect(page.getByTestId('positioner')).not.toBeInTheDocument())
  })
```


</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

根据错误信息，问题主要有两类：

1. **`userEvent.click()` 没有 `await`** - 错误提示 "The call was not awaited. This method is asynchronous and must be awaited"
2. **第一个测试中使用了 `{ hidden: true }` 但元素不存在** - 因为使用了 lazy mount 默认行为

让我修复这些测试：
